epics.title: Infraestrutura Central de Pagamentos
epics.hypothesis: We believe that a unified payment API layer with provider abstraction and stable contract will result in any ecosystem app processing any payment method with a single call, without knowing which gateway is active

features.title: API Unificada de Pagamentos (Pix, Cartão, Boleto)
features.benefit_hypothesis: Developers integrate once with a single REST contract and process all payment types, reducing integration time from weeks to hours
acceptance_criteria: POST /pay/pix creates a Pix charge and returns QR code + copy-paste text
POST /pay/card charges a card (new or tokenized) and returns status
POST /pay/boleto issues a boleto with barcode and optional Pix QR
GET /pay/transactions/:id returns transaction status for any payment type
All endpoints require Authorization, X-Source-App, and X-Idempotency-Key headers
Response payload is identical regardless of active provider (internal or external)

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero criar uma cobrança Pix via API, para gerar QR Code e copia-e-cola para o cliente final

acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated app with valid API key and X-Source-App header
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/pix with amount (centavos), customer_name, customer_document, and X-Idempotency-Key
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with transaction_id, qr_code (base64), qr_code_text, expiration, and status 'pending'

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Pix charge with missing idempotency key
acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated app sends a valid Pix payload
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 400 with error code IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REQUIRED

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Duplicate Pix charge with same idempotency key
acceptance_criteria.given: A Pix charge already exists with idempotency_key 'abc-123'
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 200 with the existing transaction result (no new charge created)

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero cobrar um cartão de crédito via API, para processar pagamentos à vista ou parcelados

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Successful card charge with new card
acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated app with valid credentials
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/card with amount, customer data, card_number, card_expiry, card_cvv, card_holder_name, and installments=1
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with transaction_id, status 'completed' or 'failed', card_last4, and card_brand

acceptance_criteria.given: A card_token exists in the vault for the customer
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/card with amount, customer data, and card_token (without raw card data)
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with transaction result using the tokenized card

acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated app sends a card charge with installments=6
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/card with valid card data and installments between 2 and 12
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with card_installments=6 and total amount divided accordingly

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero emitir um boleto registrado via API, para oferecer pagamento via boleto com QR Code Pix embutido

acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated app with valid credentials
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/boleto with amount, customer data, due_date, and description
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with transaction_id, barcode, digitable_line, pix_qr_code, due_date, and status 'pending'

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Boleto with discount for early payment
acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated app sends boleto with discount_amount=500 and discount_days=5
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/boleto with valid payload including discount fields
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with boleto that includes discount information in the response

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero consultar o status de qualquer transação, para atualizar a UI do meu app em tempo real

acceptance_criteria.given: A transaction with id 'tx-123' exists in the system
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 200 with full transaction data including current status, type, amount, timestamps

acceptance_criteria.given: No transaction with id 'tx-nonexistent' exists
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 404 with error code TRANSACTION_NOT_FOUND

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero estornar uma transação total ou parcialmente, para devolver valores ao cliente quando necessário

acceptance_criteria.given: A completed card transaction 'tx-123' with amount 5000 (R$50,00)
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with refund_id, amount=5000, status='refunded', and original transaction status changes to 'refunded'

acceptance_criteria.given: A completed card transaction 'tx-123' with amount 5000
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with refund_id, amount=2000, and original transaction status changes to 'partially_refunded'

acceptance_criteria.given: A completed boleto transaction 'tx-456'
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 422 with error code BOLETO_NOT_REFUNDABLE

features.title: Provider Pattern com Abstração de Gateway
features.benefit_hypothesis: The ecosystem can switch payment gateways with zero code changes in consuming apps, protecting against vendor lock-in and enabling cost optimization
acceptance_criteria: PaymentProvider interface defines contract for all payment operations
AsaasAdapter implements PaymentProvider and maps to Asaas API v3
InternalAdapter implements PaymentProvider with local simulation
ProviderFactory returns the active adapter based on PAYMENT_PROVIDER flag
Switching provider via admin endpoint does not require service restart
Response payloads are identical between Internal and Asaas modes

stories.title: Como Platform Owner, quero alternar entre provider Internal e Asaas via painel admin, para controlar o modo de operação sem tocar em código

acceptance_criteria.given: Current provider is 'internal' and admin user has 'admin' role
acceptance_criteria.then: Provider switches to Asaas adapter, audit log records the change with user_id and timestamp, response confirms new mode

acceptance_criteria.given: Admin user attempts to switch provider
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 400 with message requiring explicit confirmation due to impact on in-flight transactions

acceptance_criteria.given: A user with role 'operator' is logged in
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 403 with error code INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero que o contrato da API seja idêntico independente do provider ativo, para que meu app funcione sem alterações em qualquer modo

acceptance_criteria.given: A Pix charge is created with identical payload
acceptance_criteria.when: The same request is processed by InternalAdapter and AsaasAdapter
acceptance_criteria.then: Both return PixChargeResult with the same structure: transaction_id, provider_id, qr_code, qr_code_text, expiration, status

acceptance_criteria.given: A card charge is created with identical payload
acceptance_criteria.when: The same request is processed by InternalAdapter and AsaasAdapter
acceptance_criteria.then: Both return CardChargeResult with the same structure: transaction_id, provider_id, status, card_token, card_last4, card_brand

features.title: Autenticação e Registro de Apps Consumidores
features.benefit_hypothesis: Each ecosystem app authenticates with its own service API key, enabling per-app tracking, rate limiting, and access control
acceptance_criteria: Apps authenticate via X-API-Key header matched against app_registrations table
Each app has a unique service API key auto-generated on registration
X-Source-App header is validated against the registered app name
Rate limiting enforced at 100 transactions/minute per app
Admin can register, update, and deactivate apps via admin panel

stories.title: Como Platform Owner, quero registrar um novo app no ecossistema via painel admin, para que ele possa consumir a API de pagamentos

acceptance_criteria.given: Admin user is logged in with 'admin' role
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with app_id, app_name, auto-generated api_key, callback_base_url, and is_active=true

acceptance_criteria.given: An app with name 'ecp-bank' already exists
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 409 with error code APP_ALREADY_EXISTS

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero que meu app seja autenticado via API key com rate limiting, para garantir segurança e proteção contra abuso

acceptance_criteria.given: An app registered with api_key 'ecp-bank-dev-key'
acceptance_criteria.then: Request is authenticated and X-Source-App is set to 'ecp-bank'

acceptance_criteria.given: App 'ecp-bank' has made 100 requests in the last minute
acceptance_criteria.when: 101st request arrives from 'ecp-bank' within the same minute
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 429 with error code RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED and Retry-After header

acceptance_criteria.given: No app registered with api_key 'invalid-key'
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 401 with error code UNAUTHORIZED

features.title: Cofre de Tokens (Card Vault) Cross-App
features.benefit_hypothesis: Customers save their card once in any ecosystem app and reuse it across all apps, improving conversion and reducing friction
acceptance_criteria: Card tokenization saves token + last4 + brand + holder_name (never full number or CVV)
Tokens are linked to customer_document (CPF/CNPJ) and reusable cross-app
GET /pay/cards/:customer_document returns all active tokens for that customer
DELETE /pay/cards/tokens/:token_id soft-deletes the token
Admin panel shows token statistics by brand and source app

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero tokenizar o cartão do cliente durante a cobrança, para reutilizá-lo em futuras compras sem pedir dados novamente

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Card tokenized on first charge with save_card=true
acceptance_criteria.given: A card charge with save_card=true for customer CPF '123.456.789-00'
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/card with full card data and save_card=true
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns card_token in the response and persists token, last4, brand, holder_name in card_tokens table (never the full number or CVV)

acceptance_criteria.scenario: List saved cards for a customer
acceptance_criteria.given: Customer '123.456.789-00' has 2 active tokens (Visa ending 4242, Mastercard ending 5555)
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns array with 2 tokens showing last4, brand, holder_name for each (no sensitive data)

features.title: Split de Pagamento por Transação
features.benefit_hypothesis: Platform can automatically distribute payment proceeds between platform, seller, and delivery, enabling marketplace-style transactions
acceptance_criteria: Split rules can be defined per transaction at creation time
Sum of all split parts must equal the total transaction amount
Split records are persisted in splits table linked to transaction_id
Admin panel shows split distribution per transaction and aggregated reports

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero definir regras de split ao criar uma transação, para distribuir automaticamente o valor entre as partes envolvidas

acceptance_criteria.given: An authenticated ecp-food app creating a Pix charge of R$100,00 (10000 centavos)
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/pix with splits: [{account_id: 'seller-01', amount: 8000, type: 'fixed'}, {account_id: 'platform', amount: 1000, type: 'fixed'}, {account_id: 'delivery', amount: 1000, type: 'fixed'}]
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with transaction and 3 split records totaling 10000 centavos

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Split validation fails when sum does not match total
acceptance_criteria.given: A charge of 10000 centavos
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 422 with error code SPLIT_SUM_MISMATCH

epics.title: Velocidade de Desenvolvimento do Ecossistema
epics.hypothesis: We believe that providing an internal simulation mode, deterministic testing, and unified documentation will result in developers integrating payments in hours instead of weeks, without any dependency on external services

features.title: Modo Internal — Simulação Completa de Pagamentos
features.benefit_hypothesis: Developers and QA can run the entire payment ecosystem locally with zero external dependencies, testing all scenarios deterministically in milliseconds
acceptance_criteria: InternalAdapter simulates Pix with configurable auto-approve delay (0-60s, default 5s)
InternalAdapter simulates Card: approved if amount < R$10.000 and last4 != 9999; rejected otherwise
InternalAdapter simulates Boleto with mock barcode, payable via admin panel button
Internal mode generates callbacks identical to Asaas mode
All internal operations complete with latency < 100ms (excluding configured delay)

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero que cobranças Pix sejam aprovadas automaticamente no modo internal, para testar fluxos completos sem sandbox externo

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal and INTERNAL_SIMULATION_DELAY=5000
acceptance_criteria.then: Transaction created with status 'pending', auto-transitions to 'completed' after 5 seconds, and callback is sent to the app's callback_url

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Pix instant approval with zero delay
acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal and INTERNAL_SIMULATION_DELAY=0
acceptance_criteria.then: Transaction immediately transitions to 'completed' and callback is sent

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero que cobranças de cartão tenham regras determinísticas no modo internal, para testar cenários de aprovação e rejeição de forma previsível

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/card with amount=5000 and card_number ending in 4242
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns status 'completed' immediately

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns status 'failed' with decline_reason 'CARD_DECLINED'

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns status 'failed' with decline_reason 'LIMIT_EXCEEDED'

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero emitir boletos com código mock no modo internal, para testar o fluxo completo sem integração com banco

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns status 'pending' with mock barcode in FEBRABAN format and mock Pix QR code

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Boleto payment simulated via admin panel
acceptance_criteria.given: A pending boleto transaction in internal mode
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator clicks 'Simular pagamento' in the admin panel
acceptance_criteria.then: Boleto status changes to 'completed' and callback is sent to the originating app

features.title: Ambiente de Staging Determinístico
features.benefit_hypothesis: QA and release managers can validate all payment flows in a 100% controlled staging environment with predictable behavior, increasing release confidence
acceptance_criteria: Staging environment runs with PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal by default
All simulation parameters are configurable via admin panel Settings page
Feature flags (auto-approve delay, max simulated amount, etc.) are editable at runtime without restart
Internal mode banner is displayed on all admin panel pages when active

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero configurar parâmetros de simulação via painel admin, para controlar o comportamento do modo internal sem editar variáveis de ambiente

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Change simulation delay via admin panel
acceptance_criteria.given: Admin user on Settings page with PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator adjusts the simulation delay slider to 10 seconds and saves
acceptance_criteria.then: INTERNAL_SIMULATION_DELAY is updated to 10000ms, new Pix transactions auto-approve after 10s, change is recorded in audit log

acceptance_criteria.given: Admin user on Settings page
acceptance_criteria.then: Card transactions in internal mode require manual approval via admin panel, no service restart needed

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero ver um banner visual claro quando o modo internal está ativo, para nunca confundir transações simuladas com reais

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=internal is active
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator navigates to any page in the admin panel
acceptance_criteria.then: A yellow banner 'MODO INTERNAL — transações simuladas' is displayed at the top of every page

acceptance_criteria.given: PAYMENT_PROVIDER=external is active
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator navigates to any page in the admin panel
acceptance_criteria.then: No internal mode banner is visible

features.title: Gestão de Apps e Onboarding de Desenvolvedores
features.benefit_hypothesis: New developers can self-serve: register their app, get an API key, and test payments in internal mode within minutes, without needing admin intervention or external credentials
acceptance_criteria: Apps page shows all registered apps with masked API keys, callback URLs, and transaction volume
Register new app modal auto-generates API key on creation
Transaction detail shows request/response JSON payloads for learning
Admin can deactivate an app (soft disable) without deleting it

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero visualizar todos os apps registrados no painel admin, para monitorar quem está consumindo a API e com qual volume

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Apps list displayed with key metrics
acceptance_criteria.given: 3 apps registered (ecp-bank, ecp-emps, ecp-food)
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator navigates to the Apps page
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows cards for each app with name, masked API key (first 8 chars + ****), callback_base_url, is_active status, and transaction count

acceptance_criteria.given: App 'ecp-food' is active
acceptance_criteria.then: App is_active becomes false, API requests with ecp-food's key return 403, audit log records the action

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero ver os payloads de request/response de transações existentes no painel, para aprender o formato da API por exemplos reais

acceptance_criteria.scenario: View request/response payloads in transaction detail
acceptance_criteria.given: A completed Pix transaction 'tx-123' exists
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator opens transaction detail page for 'tx-123'
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows CodeBlock components with syntax-highlighted JSON for the original request payload and the provider response payload

epics.title: Confiabilidade e Operação em Produção
epics.hypothesis: We believe that building idempotency, guaranteed webhook delivery with retry, and full transaction observability will result in a production-grade payment service trusted with real money from day one

features.title: Idempotência e Deduplicação de Transações
features.benefit_hypothesis: Retry scenarios never cause duplicate charges, giving apps and operators confidence that financial operations are safe to retry
acceptance_criteria: Every mutation endpoint requires X-Idempotency-Key (UUID v4)
Duplicate idempotency_key returns the existing result with 200 (not a new transaction)
Idempotency key is stored as UNIQUE constraint on transactions table
Dedup events are recorded in audit log for operational visibility
Admin panel shows idempotency_key in transaction detail

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero que retries com a mesma idempotency_key retornem o resultado original, para garantir que falhas de rede nunca causem cobranças duplicadas

acceptance_criteria.given: No transaction exists with idempotency_key 'key-abc'
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 201 with new transaction

acceptance_criteria.given: Transaction with idempotency_key 'key-abc' already exists and is 'completed'
acceptance_criteria.when: POST /pay/pix with same X-Idempotency-Key='key-abc' and same payload
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 200 with the existing transaction result (no new transaction created)

acceptance_criteria.given: Any mutation endpoint (POST /pay/pix, POST /pay/card, POST /pay/boleto)
acceptance_criteria.when: Request is sent without X-Idempotency-Key header
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 400 with error code IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REQUIRED

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero ver a idempotency_key e eventos de deduplicação no detalhe da transação, para investigar cenários de retry dos apps consumidores

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Idempotency key visible in transaction detail
acceptance_criteria.given: Transaction 'tx-123' with idempotency_key 'key-abc'
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows idempotency_key 'key-abc' in monospace font in the header section

acceptance_criteria.given: A duplicate request was received for 'tx-123' at 14:30:05
acceptance_criteria.then: Timeline shows a 'Duplicate request received — returned existing result' event at 14:30:05 with source app info

features.title: Webhook Delivery com Retry e Backoff Exponencial
features.benefit_hypothesis: Apps are always notified of payment status changes, even during transient failures, ensuring eventual consistency between ECP Pay and consuming apps
acceptance_criteria: Callbacks sent to app's callback_url on every transaction status change
Failed deliveries retried 3 times with exponential backoff (30s, 2min, 10min)
After 3 failed attempts, status becomes 'delivery_failed'
Webhook events table provides idempotent processing (event_id dedup)
Admin panel shows delivery status, attempt count, and allows manual retry

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero receber callbacks automáticos quando o status de uma transação mudar, para atualizar o estado no meu app sem polling

acceptance_criteria.given: A pending Pix transaction from 'ecp-food' with callback_url 'http://localhost:3336/callbacks'
acceptance_criteria.then: HTTP POST to callback_url with payload containing event='payment.completed', transaction_id, type='pix', amount, status='completed', source_app='ecp-food', timestamp

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Callback per-transaction URL overrides app default
acceptance_criteria.given: App ecp-food has default callback_base_url, but transaction was created with callback_url='http://localhost:3336/special-callback'
acceptance_criteria.then: Callback is sent to 'http://localhost:3336/special-callback' (transaction-level URL takes precedence)

stories.title: Como Developer ECP, quero que callbacks falhos sejam reenviados automaticamente com backoff exponencial, para que indisponibilidade temporária do meu app não cause perda de eventos

acceptance_criteria.given: Callback to 'ecp-food' failed (HTTP 500 or timeout) at attempt 1
acceptance_criteria.then: System retries the callback (attempt 2 of 3)

acceptance_criteria.given: Callback attempt 2 also failed
acceptance_criteria.then: System retries the callback (attempt 3 of 3)

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Final failure after all retries exhausted
acceptance_criteria.given: All 3 callback attempts failed
acceptance_criteria.then: callback_status becomes 'delivery_failed', no more automatic retries

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero gerenciar webhooks recebidos e enviados no painel admin com opção de retry manual, para garantir que nenhum app fique sem notificação

acceptance_criteria.given: 10 webhooks received from Asaas and 15 callbacks sent to apps
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows two tabs: 'Recebidos' with 10 events (event_id, type, transaction link, processed status) and 'Enviados' with 15 callbacks (destination app, delivery status badge, attempt count)

acceptance_criteria.given: A callback to ecp-food has status 'delivery_failed' (3/3 attempts exhausted)
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator clicks 'Retry' button on the failed callback row
acceptance_criteria.then: POST /admin/webhooks/:id/retry triggers a new delivery attempt, status changes to 'retrying', audit log records the manual action

acceptance_criteria.given: A webhook event in the list
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator clicks to expand/drill-down into the event
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows full JSON payload in CodeBlock component with syntax highlighting and copy button

features.title: Observabilidade de Transações — Timeline e Dashboard
features.benefit_hypothesis: Operators can investigate any transaction from creation to completion in one view, reducing incident resolution time from hours to minutes
acceptance_criteria: Transaction detail shows TransactionTimeline with all lifecycle events
Each timeline event has timestamp, elapsed time from previous, and semantic color
Timeline nodes are expandable to show request/response payloads
Dashboard shows 6 KPI cards: volume, transaction count, success rate, revenue/hour, active tokens, pending webhooks
Dashboard includes volume chart by app, type distribution donut, and success rate bar chart

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero ver a timeline completa de uma transação no detalhe, para investigar exatamente onde uma falha ocorreu

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Complete transaction timeline for successful Pix
acceptance_criteria.given: A completed Pix transaction 'tx-123' with full lifecycle
acceptance_criteria.then: TransactionTimeline shows chronological events: created → sent_to_provider → provider_response → webhook_received → callback_sent → callback_delivered → completed, each with timestamp and elapsed time

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Failed transaction timeline shows error point
acceptance_criteria.given: A failed card transaction 'tx-456' that was declined by provider
acceptance_criteria.then: Timeline shows events up to provider_response with a red 'failed' node containing the decline reason, and no subsequent callback events

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Expand timeline node to see payload
acceptance_criteria.given: Transaction timeline is displayed with expandable nodes
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator clicks on the 'provider_response' event node
acceptance_criteria.then: Node expands to show the full provider response payload in a CodeBlock with syntax highlighting

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero ver um dashboard com KPIs e gráficos das transações do ecossistema, para monitorar a saúde do sistema em tempo real

acceptance_criteria.given: Transactions exist in the system across multiple apps and types
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator navigates to the Dashboard page
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows 6 KPI cards: total volume (R$), transaction count, success rate (%), revenue/hour, active card tokens, pending webhooks — each with period comparison and trend arrow

acceptance_criteria.given: Transactions exist from ecp-bank, ecp-emps, and ecp-food with Pix, Card, and Boleto types
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows volume line chart with per-app breakdown, donut chart by payment type (Pix/Card/Boleto), and success rate bar chart by app

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero filtrar e buscar transações com múltiplos critérios, para encontrar rapidamente qualquer transação específica

acceptance_criteria.given: Transactions exist from multiple apps, types, and statuses
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator applies filters: type=pix, status=completed, source_app=ecp-food, date range=last 7 days
acceptance_criteria.then: Table shows only Pix transactions from ecp-food that completed in the last 7 days, with sortable columns and pagination

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Search by customer document or transaction ID
acceptance_criteria.given: Transaction 'tx-123' for customer CPF '123.456.789-00' exists
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator types '123.456.789-00' in the search field
acceptance_criteria.then: Table filters to show all transactions for that customer document

features.title: Auditoria e Logging Estruturado
features.benefit_hypothesis: Every action is traceable and auditable, meeting compliance requirements and enabling forensic investigation of any event in the system
acceptance_criteria: All admin actions are recorded in audit_logs with user_id, action, resource, timestamp, IP
All API calls are logged with request/response summary
Configuration changes (feature flags, provider switch, app registration) are audited
Admin panel provides searchable audit log page with filters
Soft delete policy: no record is physically deleted

stories.title: Como Platform Owner, quero que toda ação administrativa seja registrada em log de auditoria, para rastrear quem fez o quê e quando no sistema

acceptance_criteria.given: Admin 'Edson' switches provider from internal to external
acceptance_criteria.then: Audit log entry created with user_id='edson-id', action='SWITCH_PROVIDER', resource='provider', metadata={from: 'internal', to: 'external'}, ip_address, timestamp

acceptance_criteria.scenario: View audit logs in admin panel
acceptance_criteria.given: Multiple audit log entries exist
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator navigates to Audit Log page with filter action='SWITCH_PROVIDER'
acceptance_criteria.then: Shows filtered list of provider switch events with who, when, and details

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero executar ações operacionais (reprocessar, estornar, cancelar) diretamente no detalhe da transação, para resolver problemas sem intervenção de engenharia

acceptance_criteria.given: A completed card transaction 'tx-123' with amount 5000
acceptance_criteria.when: Operator clicks 'Estornar' button and confirms the full refund
acceptance_criteria.then: Refund is processed, transaction status changes to 'refunded', callback is sent to originating app, audit log records the action with operator's user_id

acceptance_criteria.scenario: Cancel pending boleto from detail page
acceptance_criteria.given: A pending boleto transaction 'tx-456'
acceptance_criteria.then: Boleto status changes to 'cancelled', callback sent to originating app, audit log records the action

features.title: Autenticação e RBAC do Painel Admin
features.benefit_hypothesis: Admin panel access is secure with role-based permissions, ensuring operators can only perform actions appropriate to their role level
acceptance_criteria: Login via email/password with JWT token
Three roles: admin (full access), operator (transactions + webhooks), viewer (read-only)
Protected routes validate JWT and check role permissions
Session expiry and invalid token handling

stories.title: Como Financial Operator, quero fazer login no painel admin com email e senha, para acessar as ferramentas de monitoramento com segurança

acceptance_criteria.given: Admin user 'admin@ecpay.dev' with password 'Admin@123' exists
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns JWT token with user data (id, name, email, role), token valid for configured expiry

acceptance_criteria.given: User 'admin@ecpay.dev' exists
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 401 with error code INVALID_CREDENTIALS

acceptance_criteria.given: User logged in with role 'viewer'
acceptance_criteria.then: Returns 403 with error code INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS

customer_value.evidence: Low-fi validated through Opportunity Solution Tree with 15 opportunities mapped to 5 KRs. High-fi validated through 7 solution hypotheses (HYP-01 to HYP-07) with 26 critical assumptions mapped to prototype screens. The 3 personas (Developer ECP, Financial Operator, Platform Owner) are clearly defined with distinct needs. The 9 prioritized opportunities were selected via WSJF scoring with explicit rationale, covering the complete user journey from API integration to production operations.
residual_risks: OQ-03: Split functionality scope depends on whether it is used beyond ecp-food — currently scoped as MVP feature but may need expansion
Developer persona needs are validated through architectural analysis and ecosystem patterns, not direct user interviews (acceptable given internal-only user base)

kr_impact: KR-01: EP-01 (FT-01 unified API + FT-03 app registration) + EP-02 (FT-06 internal mode + FT-08 developer onboarding) directly reduce integration time from weeks to hours
KR-02: EP-01 (FT-01 all transactions through ECP Pay) + EP-03 (FT-11 dashboard + FT-12 audit) centralize 100% of transactions in a single observable ledger
KR-03: EP-01 (FT-02 provider pattern) enables zero-code gateway swaps — verified by contract parity requirement in US-07
KR-04: EP-02 (FT-06 internal mode + FT-07 deterministic staging) enables 100% of payment scenarios testable offline with latency < 100ms
KR-05: EP-03 (FT-09 idempotency + FT-10 webhook retry + FT-11 observability) targets 99.9% API uptime and >99% webhook first-attempt delivery
residual_risks: AS-03: SQLite scalability — the backlog assumes hundreds of thousands of transactions, not millions per day. If volume exceeds expectations, database migration will be needed
OQ-01: Volume targets for KR-05 availability are set without baseline data — the 99.9% target may be over-engineering for initial volumes

usability.evidence: Prototype plan covers 8 screens, 7 flows, and 8 key interactions validated against HYP-01 through HYP-07. Design follows density-first pattern (Stripe/Datadog inspiration per PP-05). Norman's principles applied: visibility of system status (provider indicator, internal mode banner, transaction status badges), feedback (confirmation modals, simulation buttons), constraints (destructive actions require confirmation). Critical screen prioritization: Transaction Detail (convergence point for 4/7 hypotheses), Dashboard (entry point), Providers (highest-risk interaction).
friction_points: CA-09: Developers may prefer env vars over admin panel for Internal Mode controls — mitigated by supporting both mechanisms
CA-19: Two-tab webhook design (Received/Sent) needs validation that operators naturally think in this mental model vs. a unified timeline view
Admin panel is an operational tool for internal users (PP-05), not a consumer-facing product — usability bar is functional correctness over polish

technical_feasibility.evidence: Stack (TypeScript + Fastify 5.0 + SQLite3 + React 18.3 + Vite 5.4) is identical to the existing ECP ecosystem, ensuring team familiarity and code reuse. Provider Pattern is a well-documented design pattern with clear interface contract (PaymentProvider interface defined in tech_spec §3.1). Database schema (10 tables, 15 indices) is straightforward relational design compatible with SQLite. Internal mode simulation is self-contained with no external dependencies. Webhook retry with exponential backoff is a standard pattern. RBAC with JWT is already proven in ecp-digital-bank. Total scope: 29 API endpoints (9 payment + 20 admin), 8 SPA routes, 13 features — achievable within the defined architecture.
risks: AS-03: SQLite write contention under concurrent payment processing — mitigated by better-sqlite3 synchronous driver and WAL mode
Asaas API mapping complexity: the AsaasAdapter must correctly map between Asaas-specific payloads and the unified contract — requires thorough integration testing with Asaas sandbox

Webhook delivery reliability depends on the consuming app's availability — the 3-retry with backoff is standard but 'delivery_failed' after 3 attempts means some events may require manual intervention (covered by US-23 manual retry)
